bugs.title: Repeated task completed toast
bugs.root_cause: Two separate systems fire completion toasts: (1) intake detail poll at 3s intervals, (2) SSE task event handler. Poll had no guard against re-firing after initial completion.
bugs.fix: Added wasComplete guard in poll handler. SSE toast suppressed when intake detail is active.

bugs.title: Scroll hijack on task completion
bugs.root_cause: showIntakeDetail() always called scrollIntoView(). Poll completion handler called showIntakeDetail() which re-scrolled. Multiple approve/reject/deliberate handlers also call showIntakeDetail().
bugs.fix: showIntakeDetail() now detects same-task re-fetch (isNewOpen check). Only scrolls and shows 'Loading...' on first open or task switch. Re-fetches for same task update silently in-place.

bugs.title: Deliverable links return 404
bugs.root_cause: /api/task-outputs returned paths as 'state/deliverables/file.md' but /api/file/ resolves from RPGPO_ROOT. Correct path is '04-Dashboard/state/deliverables/file.md'.
bugs.fix: Prefixed path with '04-Dashboard/' in task-outputs API response.

bugs.title: SSE intake list refresh causes layout shift during reading
bugs.root_cause: SSE debounced loadIntakeTasks() fires every 3s when intake tab is active, re-rendering the list while operator reads detail panel.
bugs.fix: Skip list refresh when selectedIntakeTaskId is set (detail panel open).

bugs.title: Poll starts on already-complete tasks
bugs.root_cause: showIntakeDetail() always called startIntakeDetailPoll() including for done/failed tasks, causing unnecessary polling.
bugs.fix: Only start poll if task status is not done/failed/canceled.
